source_title: План дальнейших исследований для v11 — Forensic audit of v10
goal: Conduct a strict forensic audit of v10 microstructure overlay results to confirm or reject their validity before any further research.
global_constraints: Immutable reference: active-signal-v1@1 only; never modify baseline parameters, thresholds, features, or execution logic.
No new features, new directional scouts, early-cuts, or label changes are permitted in v11.
All comparisons must use identical train / selection-OOS / lockbox windows (same-window truth only).
Lockbox must never be used to choose thresholds, labels, or model hyper-parameters.
Short-only, long-only, and combined veto must be tested in separate runs; identical deltas across all three must be explained, not accepted.
Rule-based overlay must be tested before model-backed overlay.
PROMOTE status is only valid if v10 survives the entire forensic cycle.

stages.title: Freeze and forensic-cycle setup
stages.objective: Lock v11 into audit-only mode and register the immutable reference, audit axes, and open-items checklist.
actions: Open a dedicated research_project for v11 with audit-only scope.
Record in research_record: v10 claimed success, why forensic validation is needed, specific red flags to check.
Freeze immutable reference: snapshot_id=active-signal-v1, version=1, symbol=BTCUSDT, anchor=1h, execution=5m.
Create research_map axes: audit_block, side, run_type, leakage_type, comparison_window, final_verdict.

Create open-items register with all audit checkpoints: reference_integrity, window_integrity, feature_leakage_audit, label_leakage_audit, snapshot_assembly_audit, reproduce_v10, same_window_base_runs, short_long_combined_separation, cannibalization_ownership, final_v11_verdict.
success_criteria: Dedicated v11 audit project exists with immutable reference frozen and full open-items register created.

stages.title: Exact reproduction of v10 from scratch
stages.objective: Reproduce the v10 result without any manual adjustments or prior knowledge to establish a clean baseline truth.
actions: Rebuild dataset and micro-core features from raw data.
Recalculate baselines: bucket veto and threshold veto.
Rebuild best short and long veto models.
Rebuild overlay snapshot.
Repeat reported lockbox result without any corrections.
success_criteria: Reproduction verdict is recorded: reproduced exactly, partially reproduced, or not reproduced.

stages.title: Reference integrity audit
stages.objective: Resolve the core contradiction in v10: lockbox baseline is listed as @3 instead of the declared @1.
actions: Open and compare active-signal-v1@1 vs active-signal-v1@3.
Check logic, parameters, execution rules, filters, exits, symbol, and window coverage for both snapshots.
If snapshots are not identical: declare v10 comparison invalid and rerun all v10 comparisons strictly against @1.
success_criteria: Clear verdict: @1 == @3 or @1 != @3 with documented evidence.

stages.title: Window integrity audit
stages.objective: Verify that all v10 comparisons were made on identical windows with no look-ahead or data leakage through threshold selection.
actions: Record exact train, selection-OOS, and lockbox window boundaries.
Verify thresholds were selected only on selection-OOS, never on lockbox.
Verify lockbox was never used to choose thresholds or labels.
Verify the same lockbox window was used for both base and overlay.
Check that windows did not shift between short / long / combined runs.
success_criteria: Window discipline verdict: valid or invalid, with boundary timestamps documented.

stages.title: Feature leakage audit
stages.objective: Verify that every micro-structure feature is causally clean with no future information leaking into decisions.
actions: For each micro-feature audit: source timeframe, exact aggregation cutoff, future 5m bar leakage into 1h decision, warmup/null handling, materialization alignment.
Focus on cf_micro_imbalance_1h, cf_micro_close_pressure_1h, cf_micro_shock_cluster_1h.
Run shift test: shift feature by +1 bar and check if suspiciously strong results persist.
Run null-mask sanity: check if feature presence/absence is itself a hidden signal.
Run timestamp audit: manually verify several decision timestamps.
success_criteria: Per-feature leakage verdict: leakage absent, suspicious, or confirmed leakage.

stages.title: Label leakage and shortcut audit
stages.objective: Determine whether the suspiciously high veto model AUC (~0.95) is caused by label construction nearly overlapping with the dominant feature.
actions: Inspect construction of bad_trade_pnl_balanced, fragile_trade_mae_balanced, bad_trade_composite_balanced.
Measure direct association between label membership and cf_micro_imbalance_1h.
Check for near-direct threshold shortcut between label definition and feature values.
Run ablation: model with only cf_micro_imbalance_1h.
Run ablation: model without cf_micro_imbalance_1h.
Run ablation: model with shuffled labels.
Run ablation: model with shuffled feature.
success_criteria: Label verdict: labels valid, labels too shortcut-prone, or labels invalid.

stages.title: Snapshot assembly audit
stages.objective: Verify that veto overlay snapshot logic respects causal order and does not retroactively block trades with future knowledge.
actions: Inspect overlay snapshot logic end-to-end.
Verify when veto decision is computed and which feature values are available at decision moment.
Check that no already-opened trade is blocked retroactively.
Check that no mixed logic between long/short veto exists.
Separately audit short-only, long-only, and combined snapshot variants.
success_criteria: Causal verdict per snapshot variant: decision timing, causal blocking, side isolation, and mixed-logic absence all confirmed or flagged.

stages.title: Same-window matched reruns
stages.objective: Run base and all overlay variants on the identical lockbox window to produce a trustworthy matched comparison.
actions: Run immutable base @1 on the agreed lockbox window.
Run short-only veto overlay over base on the same window.
Run long-only veto overlay over base on the same window.
Run combined veto overlay over base on the same window.
For each run compute: trades, net PnL, profit factor, max drawdown, win rate, removed trades, removed winners.
success_criteria: Matched same-window comparison table is complete with all four routes on identical boundaries.
stages.gate_hint: All prior audits (reference, window, feature leakage, label leakage, snapshot assembly) must be completed before matched reruns.

stages.title: Cannibalization and ownership audit
stages.objective: Prove that overlay improvement is driven by genuine removal of bad trades, not by hidden interaction or coverage loss.
actions: For short-only, long-only, and combined: list all removed trades, their PnL, share of removed losers, share of removed winners.
Determine which side benefits most from overlay.
Check weak-window repair: does overlay actually fix bad regimes?
Check regime-specific coverage loss: does overlay destroy profitable clusters?
Compute ownership: is improvement driven by removed bad trades or by hidden base-mechanics interaction?
success_criteria: Honest ownership/cannibalization verdict per route with quantified loser/winner removal shares.

stages.title: Negative controls and robustness
stages.objective: Stress-test the result with placebo thresholds, perturbations, time-slice splits, and cross-side application to rule out artefactual fitting.
actions: Placebo thresholds: slightly worse, slightly better, and opposite-side threshold.
Small perturbation test: threshold +/- epsilon.
Time-slice robustness: first half of lockbox vs second half.
Side-perturbation: apply long threshold to short side and vice versa.
success_criteria: Robustness verdict per test: result is stable, fragile, or collapses under perturbation.

stages.title: Final v11 verdict
stages.objective: Render the definitive forensic verdict on whether v10 microstructure overlay results are confirmed, downgraded, or rejected.
actions: Aggregate all audit findings across stages 2–10.
Cross-check reproduction status, leakage verdicts, reference/window integrity, matched comparison results, cannibalization analysis, and robustness outcomes.
Assign one of three outcomes: CONFIRMED (v10 is real), DOWNGRADED TO WATCHLIST (signal alive but methodologically weak), or REJECTED (leakage, mismatch, non-reproducibility, or improvement vanishes).
Document final verdict in research_record with supporting evidence summary.
success_criteria: Final forensic verdict recorded with clear justification: CONFIRMED, DOWNGRADED TO WATCHLIST, or REJECTED.

warnings: v10 lockbox comparison used @3 as baseline instead of the declared @1 — this mismatch must be resolved first.
v10 veto models report AUC/PR ~0.95, which is suspiciously high and could indicate label leakage or threshold shortcut.
short_veto, long_veto, and combined_veto in v10 lockbox table report identical deltas — requires explanation.
